name: Enemy
description: A comprehensive AI-driven enemy system with state-based behavior, combat mechanics, and multiplayer synchronization. Creates intelligent opponents that detect, pursue, attack, and retreat from players using configurable animations, weapons, and movement patterns. Supports multiple enemy types with customizable attributes for health, damage, speed, and attack patterns.
documentation:
## Enemy
Create hostile NPCs that chase and attack the player.

### Enemy Type
- **Aggressive** - Actively pursues the player
- **Defensive** - Only attacks when provoked
- **Patrols** - Follows a patrol pattern
- **Custom** - Fully configurable behavior

### Combat Settings
- **Weapon** - Weapon type (Hands, Sword, Rifle, Bow, etc.)
- **Health** - Enemy hit points (default: 100)
- **Attack Damage/Distance/Speed** - Combat parameters
- **Fight Distance** - Range to engage in melee
- **Respawn** - Number of times the enemy respawns
- **Fall Delay** - Delay before ragdoll on death

### Movement
- **Movement Speed** - How fast the enemy moves
- **Roam Distance** - Patrol area radius
- **Rotation Speed** - Turning speed
- **Show Roam Area** - Visualize patrol zone in editor

### Animations
Assign animations: Idle, Walking, Running, Jumping, Crouching, Tripping, Falling, Dying, Attacking.

### Tips
- Use **Start On Trigger** to activate enemies conditionally
- Physics is auto-configured (kinematic capsule)
- Combine with Trigger behavior for wave-based spawning
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start On Trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, the enemy remains inactive until a trigger event is received from another behavior.

enemyType.name: Enemy Type
enemyType.description: The AI behavior pattern for this enemy. Aggressive enemies pursue players, Defensive enemies react when provoked, and Patrol enemies follow a set path.

showRoamArea.name: Show Roam Area
showRoamArea.description: Display a visual indicator in the editor showing the enemy's patrol radius. Only visible in edit mode.

weapon.name: Type of weapon
weapon.description: The weapon this enemy uses in combat. Determines attack range, animation style, and projectile behavior.

health.name: Health
health.description: Total hit points for the enemy. When health reaches zero, the enemy plays its death animation and respawns if respawns remain.

movementSpeed.name: Movement Speed
movementSpeed.description: How fast the enemy moves when chasing or patrolling. Higher values make the enemy harder to outrun.

attackDamage.name: Attack Damage
attackDamage.description: Amount of damage dealt to the player per attack hit.

attackDistance.name: Attack Distance
attackDistance.description: Maximum distance at which the enemy detects and begins pursuing the player.

attackSpeed.name: Attack Speed
attackSpeed.description: How frequently the enemy attacks in seconds. Lower values result in faster, more aggressive attacks.

respawnAmount.name: Respawn
respawnAmount.description: Number of times this enemy respawns after being defeated. Set to 0 for no respawning.

fallDelay.name: Fall Delay
fallDelay.description: Delay in seconds before the enemy ragdolls after being defeated. Allows the death animation to play before the body falls.

fightDistance.name: Fight Distance
fightDistance.description: Distance at which the enemy stops approaching and begins its melee attack. Controls how close the enemy gets before striking.

roamDistance.name: Roam Distance
roamDistance.description: Maximum radius the enemy roams from its starting position when patrolling or idle.

rotationSpeed.name: Rotation Speed
rotationSpeed.description: How quickly the enemy turns to face its target. Higher values make the enemy rotate faster.

directionDuration.name: Direction Duration
directionDuration.description: How long in seconds the enemy moves in one direction before choosing a new heading while roaming.

idleAnimation.name: Idle
idleAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is standing still and not engaged in combat.

walkAnimation.name: Walking
walkAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is walking at normal speed.

runAnimation.name: Running
runAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is running to chase a target.

jumpAnimation.name: Jumping
jumpAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is jumping.

crouchAnimation.name: Crouching
crouchAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is crouching or taking cover.

trippingAnimation.name: Tripping
trippingAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy stumbles or is knocked off balance.

fallAnimation.name: Falling
fallAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is falling through the air.

dieAnimation.name: Dying
dieAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy is defeated and its health reaches zero.

attackAnimation.name: Attacking
attackAnimation.description: Animation to play when the enemy performs an attack on the player.
